MANDATORY SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Nov-05-2002 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day. Present: Commissioner Loretta M. Norris; Clerk: P. Dias; Reporter: Patricia L. Van Steenberge.Susan Parkinson, Esq. represented the Plaintiff, Steven Ng, and Defendant Michelle Michaels appeared in pro per. Case settled by written settlement not placed on record.

MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. Tentative ruling adopted -- Defendatn MICHELLE MICHAELS' motion to strike second amended complaint on plaintiffs Steven Ng, Paul Ng and John Ng is DENIED, 5 days leave to answer. (JJM/301/DR) Court Reporter Eric Throne, CSR 7855

To Strike To First Amended Complaint Of Plaintiffs Steven Ng, Paul Ng, And John Ng

MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES:
Defendant MICHELLE MICHAELS in propria persona and moving to strike the First Amended Complaint
